ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Boessenecker explained work performed/the extent of services provided (genealogy; translation; going to Italy to locate documents to support who the heirs were; legal research on intestate law in Italy, etc.) by Italian Legal Services to support payment in excess of the amount authorized in the Court order approving payment. Ms. Boessenecker also stated that the fees being requested is about 8% of what the Estate is worth and that she did not think there were any other options available. The Court raised the issue of going forward with a single six year accounting and informed Ms. Boessenecker that it is inclined to go with two accountings for three year periods. The First and Second Account; Petition to Determine Entitlement to Estate; Petition to Authorize Payment to Italian Legal Services was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
